heading: Prohibition on provision of gifts or travel by registered lobbyists to Members of Congress and to congressional employees
label: 1613 Prohibition on provision of gifts or travel by registered lobbyists to Members of Congress and to congressional employees
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–81, title II, § 206(b)121 Stat. 747Sept. 14, 2007“The amendment made by this section [enacting this section] shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Sept. 14, 2007
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–81, title II, § 206(b)121 Stat. 747Sept. 14, 2007“The amendment made by this section [enacting this section] shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Sept. 14, 2007

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: a Prohibition
children.text: Any person described in subsection (b) may not make a gift or provide travel to a covered legislative branch official if the person has knowledge that the gift or travel may not be accepted by that covered legislative branch official under the Rules of the House of Representatives or the Standing Rules of the Senate (as the case may be).

children.heading: Persons subject to prohibition
children.label: b Persons subject to prohibition
children.text: The persons subject to the prohibition under subsection (a) are any lobbyist that is registered or is required to register under , any organization that employs 1 or more lobbyists and is registered or is required to register under , and any employee listed or required to be listed as a lobbyist by a registrant under section 1603(b)(6) or 1604(b)(2)(C) of this title.section 1603(a)(1) of this titlesection 1603(a)(2) of this title
